title: VocabularyEntry collection
description: Schema for src/data/vocabulary/500-common-words.json. Top-level array of 450–500 VocabularyEntry objects extracted from `500 Từ phổ biến nhất trong Tiếng Anh_Mingology.pdf` (the source PDF actually contains 455 entries; its title overstates the count).

word.description: English headword as extracted from the PDF (trimmed).

meaning.description: Vietnamese gloss; null only when the PDF row lacks a meaning.

partOfSpeech.description: Lowercased part-of-speech tag (e.g. 'n', 'v', 'adj', 'adv'); null if absent.

example.description: Example sentence in English if present in the PDF; otherwise null.

session.description: Study session 1–32 assigned by sequential block distribution in PDF order.
